message:
feat(e2e,core): add hardware discovery artifact names to benchmark manifests and wire differential_status PRAGMA

- Wire differential_status PRAGMA to return real rows from
  self.differential_status_rows() instead of an empty vec
- Add hardware_discovery_bundle_json and hardware_discovery_summary_md
  fields to BenchmarkArtifactContract, BenchmarkArtifactNames structs,
  and all related JSON/schema manifests
- Add validation that all artifact name fields are non-empty in
  validate_beads_benchmark_campaign
- Refactor verify_bd_db300 topology bundle script to derive hardware
  discovery file paths from manifest artifact_names instead of
  hardcoding, preserving backwards-compatible defaults
- Fix WAL adapter test: correct intruder frame commit count from 0 to 1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
